task_completion.description: Navigate to the applications list for the Senior Developer position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo Recruitment app with a list or Kanban view of applications, specifically showing the 'Senior Developer' job position.

task_completion.description: Open the Refused application for Sarah Connor and locate the visa sponsorship note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the application form for 'Sarah Connor' in the 'Refused' stage, with the chatter/log section visible containing a note mentioning 'visa sponsorship'.

task_completion.description: Open the New application for Sarah Connor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the application form for 'Sarah Connor' in the 'New' stage.

task_completion.description: Add a new note containing the visa sponsorship information to the New application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or having posted a log note containing 'visa' or 'visa sponsorship' in the chatter section of the 'New' application for Sarah Connor.
Screenshots show the 'Refused' application being archived (e.g., clicking the 'Action' -> 'Archive' button, or a red 'Archived' ribbon visible on the application form).

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to access the Odoo interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser window with the Odoo application loaded, rather than a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo UI to add notes and archive the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking buttons, typing in text fields, and using the Odoo interface naturally, rather than executing backend scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open or used to alter the visual state of the page to fake the note or the archived status.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Candidate Name: Sarah Connor. Job Position: Senior Developer. The old application is in the 'Refused' stage and contains a note with the keyword 'visa'. The new application is in the 'New' stage. The agent must copy the visa information to the new application and archive the old one.
